title: Rename submissions to call for papers
objective: Update the homepage to rename the Submissions section to Call for Papers and replace the placeholder copy with concise guidance about 4 to 6 page paper submissions, without inventing deadlines or links.
instructions: Rename the homepage nav label and section heading from Submissions to Call for Papers.
Replace the current placeholder submissions copy with a few short lines describing 4 to 6 page paper submissions that fit the workshop scope.
Keep the tone aligned with the rest of the static site and do not add specific deadlines, formatting templates, URLs, or submission system details unless they already exist in the repo.
constraints: Do not edit control-tower memory or docs; homepage product content only.
expected_outputs: Updated homepage HTML with Call for Papers nav/section copy.
definition_of_done: The nav label reads Call for Papers.
The section heading reads Call for Papers.
The section body mentions 4 to 6 page papers and remains generic about submission logistics.
